citation: Malaysian Code of Advertising Practice — Appendix C (Comparisons)
summary: Comparative claims must be truthful, verifiable, and not denigrate competitors unfairly.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Brand versus brand, market leader, or superiority comparisons. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation on file. CHECK: Named competitor, test protocol, and date of comparison. ESCALATE IF: False denigration or unverifiable head-to-head claim.
